name: Michelangelo Buonarroti
title: Artist, Sculptor & Architect
bio: Italian sculptor, painter, architect, and poet of the High Renaissance. Created the ceiling of the Sistine Chapel, the statue of David, and the Pietà.
faith: A devout Catholic whose greatest works depicted biblical scenes and Christian themes. His Sistine Chapel ceiling telling the story of Genesis and his Pietà depicting Mary holding the body of Christ are among the most recognizable Christian artworks ever created.

sources.title: Michelangelo — Wikipedia
sources.note: Comprehensive biography including his faith-driven art

sources.title: Sistine Chapel ceiling — Wikipedia
sources.note: His masterwork depicting the Genesis narrative

tagline: Painted the ceiling of the Sistine Chapel as an act of devotion
